title: Duracrete worm

The '''duracrete worm''' was a large [[Silica parasite/Legends|silica parasite]] which was found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Wildlife" />

This parasite was a large (three to five [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long), slow-moving [[Wikipedia:helminth|helminth]], or [[Parasite/Legends|parasitic]] [[Worm/Legends|worm]]. They occupied the lower portions of buildings, eating through foundations and plumbing. They [[Reproduction/Legends|reproduced]] by parthenogenesis. They also had primitive [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], sensory tentacles near the mouth, and rasping [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] under the snout.<ref name="Wildlife" /> They were similar in appearance to the [[Duracrete slug/Legends|duracrete slugs]].

Sometimes they are hunted by [[hive rat]]s.<ref name="Wildlife" />

==Behind the scenes==
Their design was reused to create the [[Duracrete slug/Legends|duracrete slugs]] that first appeared in [[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Visual Dictionary]].<ref name="Archive">{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/ref/f20061031/index.html|text=Building a ''Complete Visual Dictionary''}}</ref>

According to [[Robert E. Barnes]], the duracrete slug is a "species-shift" from the duracrete worm, with the main difference between the two being that instead of having a soft/slimy skin, the duracrete slug has an armored skin developed from consuming and excreting duracrete and also is also bigger.<ref name="Archive" />
